CommandLine.Parameter: "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ashwac.br" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -c "Config1" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -M IA32 -B A4.83 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1" -T SG4

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -c "Config1" -sysconf -S "X20CP1382" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\sysconf.br" -T SG4 -B A4.83 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -v V1.00.0 -S "X20CP1382" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\asfw.br" -T SG4 -B A4.83 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "Config1" -zip -s "Config1" -firmware -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -v V1.00.0 -S "X20CP1382" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ashwd.br" -T SG4 -B A4.83 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "Config1" -zip -s "Config1" -hwd -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\IoMap.iom" -arconfig -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, NcGlobal: V5.24.1" -C "/RT=1000 /AM=*" -D "/IF=COM1 /BD=57600 /PA=2 /IT=20 /RS=0" -c "Config1" -v V1.00.0 -S "X20CP1382" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\arconfig.br" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ChannelConfiguration.xml" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ReActionTechnologyConfiguration.xml" -T SG4 -B A4.83 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\Motion\Acp10cfg.ncc" -a "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -m "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\Motion\Acp10map.ncm" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, NcGlobal: V5.24.1" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\acp10cfg.br" -c "Config1" -T SG4 -s "Config1.X20CP1382.Motion"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\Motion\Acp10map.ncm" -v V1.00.0 -a "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, NcGlobal: V5.24.1" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Acp10map.br" -c "Config1" -T SG4 -s "Config1.X20CP1382.Motion"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\Motion\Config.mpaxisbasic" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Config.br" -zip -B A4.83 -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, MpAxis: V1.87.0, NcGlobal: V5.24.1" -z 5.24.1 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "Config1"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ComTCP_P\ComTCP_P.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ComTCP_P.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -r Cyclic1 -p 2 -s "Libraries.ComTCP.ComTCP_P" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Input_Brid\Input_Brid.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Input_Brid.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,asieccon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic1 -p 3 -s "Input_Bridge" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Output_Bri\Output_Bri.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Output_Bri.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,asieccon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic1 -p 4 -s "Output_Bridge" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\LED_IO\LED_IO.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\LED_IO.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,asieccon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic2 -p 2 -s "LED_IO" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Master\Master.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Master.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,asieccon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic2 -p 3 -s "Master" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Slave\Slave.ox" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Slave.br" -v V1.00.0 -f "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\NT.ofs" -offsetLT "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries\Config1\X20CP1382\LT.ofs" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -extConstants -d "runtime: V* - V*,asieccon: V* - V*" -r Cyclic2 -p 4 -s "Slave" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.24.1, Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, Acp10sim: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsIODiag: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, MpAxis: V1.87.0, MpBase: V5.24.0, MpCom: V5.24.1, My_Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L\MNG_ComHdlr.cpp" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ComTCP_L\MNG_ComHdlr.cpp.o" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -s "Libraries.ComTCP.ComTCP_L" -t "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp" -specs "C:\Program Files\BRAutomation4\AS412\AS\gnuinst\V4.1.2\4.9\i386-elf\specs\I386specs_brelf" -r Library -I "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes" -trigraphs -fno-asm -D _DEFAULT_INCLUDES -D _SG4 -fPIC -O0 -g -Wall -include "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Libraries.h" -D _COMTCP_L_EXPORT -x c++ -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L\MNG_CpyOutToMsg.cpp" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ComTCP_L\MNG_CpyOutToMsg.cpp.o" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -s "Libraries.ComTCP.ComTCP_L" -t "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp" -specs "C:\Program Files\BRAutomation4\AS412\AS\gnuinst\V4.1.2\4.9\i386-elf\specs\I386specs_brelf" -r Library -I "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes" -trigraphs -fno-asm -D _DEFAULT_INCLUDES -D _SG4 -fPIC -O0 -g -Wall -include "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Libraries.h" -D _COMTCP_L_EXPORT -x c++ -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L\MNG_CpyMsgToInp.cpp" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\ComTCP_L\MNG_CpyMsgToInp.cpp.o" -T SG4 -M IA32 -B A4.83 -G V4.1.2 -s "Libraries.ComTCP.ComTCP_L" -t "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp" -specs "C:\Program Files\BRAutomation4\AS412\AS\gnuinst\V4.1.2\4.9\i386-elf\specs\I386specs_brelf" -r Library -I "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Logical\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes\Libraries\ComTCP\ComTCP_L" "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Includes" -trigraphs -fno-asm -D _DEFAULT_INCLUDES -D _SG4 -fPIC -O0 -g -Wall -include "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\X20CP1382\Libraries.h" -D _COMTCP_L_EXPORT -x c++ -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Pachore_Mayuresh_Project_1.apj" -t "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Binaries" -c "Config1" -i "C:\Program Files\BRAutomation4\AS412" -S "X20CP1382" -A "X20CP1382" -pil -swFiles "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\X20CP1382\Cpu.sw" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -C "/RT=1000 /AM=*" -D "/IF=COM1 /BD=57600 /PA=2 /IT=20 /RS=0" -M IA32 -T SG4
